title: papaver × trilobum
intro: Papaver × trilobum, also known as the Shirley poppy, is a hybrid plant in the poppy family that is bred for its vibrant flowers and hardy growth. The medicinal properties of Papaver × trilobum include the presence of alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of this plant are primarily related to its ability to aid in sleep, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antispasmodic properties. Papaver × trilobum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
